# IQDEMY Group

> Swiss industrial inkjet technology company specializing in digital printing systems, UV-LED curing, coil coating solutions, and advanced ink chemistry since 1998.

IQDEMY Group (IQDEMY SA, VAT: CHE-388.350.570, LEI: 984500S491K69QN1MC67) is headquartered at Techno-Pôle 4, Sierre 3960, Switzerland. The group develops industrial inkjet printers, inorganic UV inks, CAN bus control electronics, and UV-LED curing systems for manufacturing industries worldwide.

## Core Product

**Single-Pass Digital Printing Module for Coil Coating Lines (CCL Project)**
- Speed: 60–240 m/min | Resolution: 1200 DPI | Width: up to 2550 mm
- Color gamut: 1 billion+ colors (CRYVK scheme)
- ROI: under 12 months at 2,000,000 m² annual volume
- Energy savings: 60–70% vs thermal gas ovens
- 50+ year warranty on anti-fade and outdoor adhesion
- Cost: €0.51/m² (solid) vs traditional €1.54/m²

## Key Sections

- [CCL Project](https://iqdemy.ch/ccl_en/): Flagship coil coating digital printing module
- [Industries & Technologies](https://iqdemy.ch/en/industries-technologies/): Packaging, UV decoration, security printing, fashion, ceramics, textiles, watches, wallpaper, advertising signs, labels
- [Printing Technologies](https://iqdemy.ch/en/printing-technologies/industrial-printing/): Industrial, 3D, bioprinting, edible ink, screen, fluorescent, anodized aluminum, curved surfaces, metal dying
- [R&D](https://iqdemy.ch/en/r-d/): Bioprinting, conductive inks, quantum technologies, customized lab equipment
- [Team](https://iqdemy.ch/en/history/our-team/): Board of directors and global leadership
- [News](https://iqdemy.ch/en/blog/): Exhibition reports (FESPA, Labelexpo, DPES, Trustech, SignChina)
- [SUN Studio](https://iqdemy.ch/en/sunstudio/): Art printing franchise concept
- [Contacts](https://iqdemy.ch/en/contacts/): Switzerland, USA, France offices

## Group Entities

- **IQDEMY Group / IQDEMY SA** — parent holding, Switzerland
- **DPS Innovations** — control electronics and UV-LED systems division
- **IQDEMY Swiss Inx SA** — ink production subsidiary, Aigle, Switzerland
